nasb.text: When Gideon came, behold, a man was relating a dream to his friend. And he said, “Behold, I had a dream; a loaf of barley bread was tumbling into the camp of Midian, and it came to the tent and struck it so that it fell, and turned it upside down so that the tent lay flat.”

esv.text: When Gideon came, behold, a man was telling a dream to his comrade. And he said, “Behold, I dreamed a dream, and behold, a cake of barley bread tumbled into the camp of Midian and came to the tent and struck it so that it fell and turned it upside down, so that the tent lay flat.”

cnv.text: 基甸到了，就聽見一個人正在把他的夢告訴他的同伴，說：“我作了一個夢，夢見一個大麥餅滾入米甸營中，到了帳幕，把帳幕撞倒，帳幕就翻轉朝上了。”

ccb.text: 基甸到了那里，听见一个人对同伴说：“我做了个梦，梦见一个大麦饼滚进我们的营中，把一个帐篷撞翻在地。”
